meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't collaborate (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't collaborate. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Client Collaboration Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with client silos. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to streamline collaboration and ship professional SaaS apps faster.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves collaboration silos by enforcing a standardized, modular architecture that allows multiple AI agents and developers to work in parallel. By integrating Claude Code, you automate the synchronization of documentation and codebase logic, ensuring your client always sees a clean, production-ready state, regardless of your team's size.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your codebase has become a fragmented graveyard of 'fix-it' branches that refuse to merge. You are stuck in the collaboration trap, where every minor feature request feels like a high-stakes negotiation with your own version control. It is the silent killer of freelance momentum.

But the era of chaotic commits is over. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you transform your workflow into a unified, high-velocity engine. This isn't just about code organization; it is about building a shared language between you, the AI, and your stakeholders, ensuring every line of code is intentional, documented, and ready for deployment.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Start by bootstrapping your repository with the Antigravity standard structure to ensure modularity and clear separation of concerns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity template for a SaaS application. Include modules for authentication, database schema, and API route handling.

steps.title: Sync Context with Claude Code
steps.description: Establish a deep-context session so the AI understands your project's architectural constraints and coding standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and create a 'context.md' file that outlines our design patterns and naming conventions.

steps.title: Implement Feature Modules
steps.description: Build features in isolation using the Antigravity pattern to prevent dependency hell and allow for easier peer or AI-assisted review.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new feature module for user profile management. Ensure it adheres to the existing Antigravity service-controller pattern.

steps.title: Automate Documentation Sync
steps.description: Ensure your README and API docs are always in sync with your code changes, eliminating the 'collaboration gap'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate updated documentation for the newly created profile service and append it to the project roadmap.

steps.title: Execute Final Validation
steps.description: Run a comprehensive audit of the codebase to ensure the Antigravity template integrity remains intact before pushing to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a structural integrity check on the repository to ensure all modules follow the Antigravity standard.

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated 'scratch' branch for AI-generated code to prevent breaking the master branch during rapid prototyping.
Map your project's environment variables in a .env.example file immediately to avoid collaboration bottlenecks with your client's setup.
Leverage Claude Code's 'review' feature to act as your lead developer, catching architectural drift before you commit.
Keep your Antigravity modules under 300 lines of code to maximize AI context window efficiency and maintainability.
Use custom system prompts in Claude Code to enforce your specific coding style, ensuring your output looks like a senior engineer's work every time.
content.next_steps: Once your template is live, invite your client to the repository as a viewer so they can track progress via the generated documentation, effectively ending the 'what's the status?' email loop.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start shipping features that actually move the needle for your clients. By mastering this workflow, you aren't just a freelancer—you're a high-output engineering machine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
